chapters.text: Eihuhhinguva Pathen le kinepna Christa Jesu thupeh dungjuiya Christa Jesu solchah Paul’in.
tahsana kachapa tahbeh Timothy heng’ah, i-Pau Pathen le Christa Jesua konin lungset le khotona chule lungmon nachunga um hen.

Macedonia gama kache kona mi abang khat’in thuhil lamdang ahil louna dingu le moh thusim chule tan thei lou khanggui thu @9(Hichun tahsanna Pathen gou chinna lama phatchomsah tahsih a kinelna akonsahjoh ahi)@7
angaisah louna dinguva nahilchah theina dinga Ephesus khoa umin, tia ka-ngeh banga chu, tua jong kati ahi.
Ahivangin thu kipeh lo na pen chu lung thengle ase apha hetna pha chule tahsan kichentah a kon ngailut chu anei theina dinguva ahi.
Hichenga kon chun kimkhat akihei mangin moh houlimna lama avah koitauve.
Athuseiyu le ahimonge, tia atah tinau jong chu he louhel’in, dan thuhil ahi nomui.
Ahin dan hi adoltah a nitpa ding chun aphai, ti iheuve;
ahinla dan hi michonpha dinga hilouva dan sukeh thua nunglou, Pathen ngaisah lou chonse ho, aboh ho athenglou, pathat, nuthat, mithat,
mijong, pa le pa kikoi, mihem gu, mijou, chule jouva kihahsel, hite ho chengse dinga chule adang thuhilpha kicheh kaleh a chon aum le amaho chengse dinga chu kiphut ahi;
hiche hi pachat umtah Pathen loupina Kipana Thupha keima eikivopsah dungjuiya ahi.
Keima thahat eipea i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa chu kathangvah jinge; ajeh chu aman keima ginchat uma eingaitoa, alhacha a eipansah ahitai;
tu masanga hou taitom kanahia, abolsea kanapan a susehat kanahi jeng vangin, hepina kamu ahitai; hiti ho chu hettoh lou man le tahsan lou thua kanabol ahijeh chun.
Chule Christa Jesua tahsanna le ngailuttoh kithoa i-Pakaiyu milungset chu hadima dimlet ahitai.
Michonse ho huhhinga Jesu Christa vannoi leiset’a hunga ahi, ti tahsan umtah hi mi jousen san cheh ding doltah ahi; hiche ho lah a chu keima apipen kahi;
ahin tonsot’a hinna dinga ama hintahsan ding ho chun avettoh a ajom dinguva Jesu Christan athoh hatna chengse chu apipen keiya hi alahdoh theina dinga eihepi ahi.
Tun tonsot leng kem theilou, mu theilou, chule Pathen khatseh, ginna le ja na chule aloupina chu atonsot atonsot khangin umjing hen. Amen.

Kachapa Timothy, nangma tahsan neitah le ase apha hetna phatah neiya nangma umchan ding thudol masanga kiseisa chengse chu, hiche dungjuiya chu, phatah a gal nasat theina dinga, hiche thupeh chu nangma kapeh nahi;
abang bangin chuche tahsan le ase apha hetna chu apai lhah jeh-un atahsan kongu akeh gamtai.
Amaho lah a Hymenaeus le Alexander chu taitomna akisin lhon louna dinga keiman Satan khut’a kapehdoh ahitai.
Hijeh a chu amasapena katilkhou nahiuve, eiho Pathen ging a, lung nenga, lung monga, kichamdel’a ikhosah theina dingun mi jouse dingin,
Leng ho dingin, chule pan mun len man ho dingin, taona le thumna chule taopehna thon thangvah jingin umu hite.
Hichu eihuhhinguva Pathen mitmua phatah le lah thei ahi;
mi jousen huhhinga umna le thutah chu hetna mu cheh hen hile hichu ama lung lam ahi.
Pathen khatseh bou ahi, ama le mihem kah a Palai jong khatseh bou ahi, ama chu mihem ahi, Christa Jesu chu;
ama chu mijouse lhatdohna a ama hung kipea ahi; hiche thu hettohsahna hi aphat aphatcha hettohsah a hil ding dol ahi;
hiche dinga chu aseiphong le dingle solchah a eikipansah ahi @9(thutah kasei ahi; jou kaseipoi)@7; ginchat le thutah a chidang namdang ho hil’a kahi.
Hijeh chun pasal hon lung hang louhel le kinel baotam beihel’in muntin’ah khut theng domu hen lang taovu hen, hichu kalung got ahi.
Chutobang ma chun numeiho adol bep chan kijemu hen, kiphalam khen chan ginggeh chan umu hen; sampheh jeppah, sana, twikoh changa chule thil mantama kijem louvin,
thilpha bol’in kijem leu kati; hichu Pathen gin phonga numei chonna doltah ahi.
Imalam jousea numei chu thu noiya umhen, ging khen chan thu kihiljo hen.
Mihil ding le pasal chunga thunei dingin numei thu kapepoi; thip khenin umthim ngetnget jo hen kati bouve.
Ajeh chu amasa Adam kisema chujouva bou Evi kisema ahi;
chule Adam chu lhep lhah a um hilouva numeinu joh chubou lhep lhah a uma ahi, hichun amanu suh khelna a alhutan ahi;
ahinla lung limgeh cha le tahsana chule ngailut le kisuthenga aum jom jinguva ahile, numei chu acha hin vanga sohcha ding ahi.
Koihile Houbung lamkaiya pan nom chun natoh pha alung got ahi, ti hi ginchat umtah ahi.
Hijeh a chu Houbung lamkai chu nolnabei, numei khat jia nei, kitimthei, lung limtah, kitup tah, jindot them, mihil them,
juheh lou, miden manglou, mi nun nem hiding, dou hollou, sum ngailu lou;
ama insung phatecha po tup thei, jana neitah-a achate athua nunsah thei mi hiding ahi.
Ama insunga chunga vaipohje helou chun Pathen Houbung ho chu iti avetsuiya akaitup thei ding ham?
Atahsan thah hilou ding ahi, ajo le kiletsah hoithon tin, diabol themmo sahna chuget’in te.
Chulou jong chu, polama mite seiphat jong hiding thu ahi; achuti loule seiset’in umintin diabol thang’ah oh khante.
Chutobangma chu Houbung lhacha a pang ding jong chu migun ja umtah bou hiding ahi; mi kamtam hilou ding, juheh mi hilou ding, alam louva sum veikan lung go mi hilou ding;
chule ase apha hetoh a ginchatna thuguh tuh mibou hiding ahi.
Amaho chu kipatep masa hen, chujou le nolna bei ahiule bou lhacha na tongu hen.
Chutobangma chu numeiho jong migun ja umtah mi hehset hatlou, kitim them chule ijakaiya tahsan neitah hiding ahi.
Lhacha ho chu numei khatseh ji hicheh hen, achate chengu le ainsungu phatecha potup them cheh hiu hen.
Ajeh chu Houbung lhacha na phatecha tong ho chun amaho dinga dinna pha le Christa Jesua ginchatna a chu hakat chehna aneijiuve.
Chomkhat jou le naheng lama hung ding kinema hiche hi kahinsut ahi;
ahinla kahung gei khat le thutah khom le bul Pathen hing Houbung Pathen insunga chu mi itobanga, iti umchan dingdol ahi, nahetna ding ahi.

Pathen ngaisahna thuguh chu nelkalna beihel’a len a ahi; ‘Ama atahsa a kiphonga, Lhagaova them changa ahitai; Vantil le ho mun aumin, Chitin namtin lah a aseiphonga uma ahitai; Vannoiya tahsana uma ahitan, Loupia lah touva uma ahitai.
Ahin Lhagao Thengin kichentah-in aseiye, ni nunung lam le mi kimkhat tahsana kona pul lha a, lhagao ho misuh lamvaina doha le thilha ho thuhil’a hung lunglut ding ahiuve;
hichu ama se le pha hetna thihsa kidep tobang mipha lhem thujou seihoa kona soh ding ahi.
Amaho chun kichen akhamui; atahsana le thutah hetoh hon thangvah puma aneh dingu, tia Pathen thilsem ho chu neh ding ajadauve.
Ajeh chu Pathen thilsem jouse chu phasoh keiya ahi; pai ding imacha umlou ahi, thangvah puma ikisanle;
ajeh chu Pathen thua kon le taona a kisuthenga ahi.
Hicheng thu chu sopiho lunga khum le chun Christa Jesu lhacha phatah nahia, tu geiya nahin juipeh tahsan le thuhil pha a chu kivah khang ding nahi;
amavang hou seiset nale nupi tehse ho houlimna moh thusim chu la hih-in. Pathen ngaisahna lama them kihasinin.
Tahsa lam thil kisin hi phatchomna themcha khatcha ahi, Pathen ngaisahna lama kisin hi ima jousea phatna ahi; ajeh chu hichu tu hinkhoa dinga jong khonunga hinkho dinga jong thutep uma ahi.
Akisei chu tahsan umtah le jop sohkei ding doltah ahi.
Ajeh chu eiho tu chan a hi Pathen hinga ikinep jeh uva tonggima kiseh ihiuve; ama chu mi jouse huhhinga ahideh a chu atahsan ho huhhinga ahi.
Nangman thupeh hicheng hi penlang chule hil’in.
Nakum lhom nachapan chu koima nahsah mon umsah hih-in; ahin nangman thu lamin, nunchan khan chanin, ngailutna-in tahsanin, chule thenna lamin atahsan ho vetsui dingin umin.
Keima kahung kahsen nangma lekha simin, mi suh hal’in mi hil’in anapon thon.
Upa hon akhut angap’a kiphongdoh dungjuiya nakipeh thilpeh nanga um chu lhadoh loujenin.
Nangma hichenga hin gen ngaiyin ponthon, chule hichenga chun umjing jengin; mijouse henga nakhantou akiphondoh thei nan.
Nangma le nathuhil a chun kiging phan chingtheiyin; chule hichenga chun umin; hiti chun bol le chun nangma le nathuhil ngaiho agoma nahuhhing ding ahi.
Upa tehse phongsal hih-in, napa tobangin jolthon, khangdong ho nasopi bangin;
nupi tehse ho nanu tobangin chule numei khangdong ho chu nanaonu te ho bangin lung thengsel’in kaithon.
Meithai kicheh tah ho chu jabol’in,
amavang meithai acha atu uma chu amaho chun amasan ainsunga ho chengu ngaisahje dan le ahinguva phatna phatna a lethuhje kisinu hen; hichu Pathen mitmua lah thei tah ahi.
Ahin meithai kicheh tah achanga uma vang chu Pathena kinema sun le jan a thum le taona jenga beh jingji ahi.
Amavang atahsa nomsahna lam jenga kipea chu ahinpet jenga jong athisa ahi.
Amaho chu seiset achan louna dingun thupeh hicheng hi pen.
Ahivangin koi hijongle ama mite ding ngaito lou, ahideh chu ama insung mite ding ngaito lou chun, tahsan chu aledoh ahitai; atahsanlou sanga chonsejo ahi.
Kum som gup noiya mi hilou pasal khat ji hisa,
thilpha bolna tin a seiphat changsa, chate khoukhahsa jindot themsa, mithengte keng silpehsa, ahesoh genthei ho phatna bolsa, chonphatna jouse nung juisa, hitobang louse chu meithaiyin sun hih-in.
Ahin nutil meithai vang chu meithaiyin sun hih-in; amaho chun Christa douna in atahsa nomsahna dingu angaito jeh-un jinei ding agojiuve.
Chule akipeh nau masa apai lhah ji jeh-un themmo achang jiuve.
Chule chuche tailou jong chun, intin a alengleuvin thaset apanjiuve; chutigoh jong hilouvin, amuh them akam jauvun, mi natoh taimon, seilou ding ding aseijiuve.
Hijeh chun chutobang nutil meithai chun ji neihen, cha hing hen, inneinu na tonghen, melma chun aseisetna dingu kom beihel’in umleu kati.
Ajeh Chu tu jengin jong mi kimkhat satan nung juiyin akihei mangtauve.
Atahsana numei khat tou meithai neiya aum le ama chu amanu chun kaitho hen; Houbung pohgihsah hih hen; Houbung chun meithai kichentah chu akaitho theina dingin.
Upa vaihom themho thu lam le mihil lama pon pana gunchu ho chu, ajat nia gin le jan umu hen.
Ajeh chu Pathen lekhabun, “Bongchal chang chilpet amuh som hih-un, chule natong-an athaman asandol ahi,” ati.
Upadol hehna chu ahetoh ni le thum ahi loule la hih-in.
Adangin kichatna anei theina dingin, achonseho chu japi angsungtah a solsal’in.
Pathentoh Jesu Christa chule Vantil kilheng ho mitmua hiche thu hi kapeh nahi, kichentah a hetoh loule jachen louva thu tan louvin, kathupeh cheng hi mangin lang neiyin imacha bol hih hel’in.
Koima chunga nakhut ngam phung hih-in; chule midang chonset chan khompi hih-in; chule kisutheng jingin.
Na-oisung jeh le nadammo jingjeh chun twisih keo jeng don louvin lengpi twi them khat khat anamang jitan.
Khattou chonsetna kilangtah ahin, thutanna a lhung masa jengji ahi; chule a bang khat tou setna vangin amaho nung ajuijon ahi;
chonphatna jong chutobangma chu kilangtah ahi; chule chutobang dang dang chu imthei imacha aumpoi.
Pathen min chule athuhil chu taitoma aum louna dingin, namkoljon poh noiya um soh ho chengsen apakaite chengu chu gin le jabol doltah-in bulhingu hen.

Chule atahsana pakai neihon amaho chu sopi ahijeh chun nahsah mon boldau hen; chusangin hajen cheh jou hen; ajeh chu chutobanga phatchomna ga kisana kilah ho chu tahsan um le dei umtah ahiuve. Lung nachima Pathen ngaisah Hiti ho thu hi hil’in lang til khouvin.
Mi khat tou thuhil chom dang hil’a auma, i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa thu, thupha kicheh le Pathen ngaisahna thuhil’a chu lung lhaiya lung ngailou ahile,
ama chu akichoisangin, ahoithojin, imachala ahejipoi; hettah sangin kinelna, thu nelkalna, hi aveiyin, hia kon chun kithangset kinah, kisei set to, kiginmo, nel-hatna, asoh jin ahi;
chutobang miho lung chu sesohjia ahin, thutah neilou ahiuvin, Pathen ngaisahna hi sumlam phatchom nan angaito jiuve.
Ahin lung lhaisel’a Pathen ngaisah hi phatchomna tah chu ahi;
ajeh chu eihon vannoiya hin imacha ihinpo lutpouve, chule hichea kona jong imacha ipohdoh thei dingu ahipoi;
ahinla eihon anneh chule nihchen ponsil ineiyule hichea chu ilung lhai jeng dingu ahi.
Hao lung go ho vang chu lhepna a le thangkol’a chule ngolna tin tang le suhset nomna lam tamtah a alha lutjiuvin, miho suhgamna le manthahna a alhah lhumsah jiuve.
Ajeh chu sum ngailut hi setna jouse bul ahi; hichu mu ding kihabolna lama mi kimkhat tahsana konin avah mangun, amaho le amaho lunghemna tamtah-in akisun jiuve.
Ahin Pathen mi, nangma vang hichenga kon chun jamin, chule chonphatna, Pathen ngaisahna, tahsan, ngailutna, thoh hatna, nunnemna, hicheng chu del’in.
Ginchat kisehna pha kihaseh-in ponpanin, tonsot hin kemlou chu tuh jingin; hiche dinga chu kikou nahi; chule ahetoh tamtah ang sunga phon phatah chu naphon ahitai.
Ima jouse hinsah Pathen le Pontius Pilate ang sunga phondoh phatah phonga Christa Jesu mitmua hiche thupeh hi kapeh nahi.
I-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa hung kilah kahsen, nangman thupeh hi boh beh louhel le seisetna um louhel’in chingin.
Thunei khatseh, leng ho leng le pakaiho Pakai, pachat umtah chu aphatcha hung kilah ding ahi;

ama changseh bou chu thilouna neiya ahin, nailut theihoi hilou vah a chenga ahi; ama chu koiman mukha lou chule mu jong mu thei lou ahi, ama jenga chun choiat le tonsot thilbol thei thahat chu um jing hen. Amen.
Tu hinkhoa vannoi leiset thil’a haoho chu ahoitho louna dingun hilchah in, kichetna bei suma ki-ngai louvin, thil jouse imanchah dinga eipeuva Pathen joh a ki-ngaiyu hen;
amahon thilpha bol’u hen, hom ding jong phal’u hen, mi to nan jong thanomu hen.
Hinna tahbeh chu atuh chah theina dingun khonung hinkhoa dinga bulpha neiya akikhol theina dingun, til’in hilphan.
Vo Timothy, nangma nakichinsah cheng se hi hong phan, chule hou seisetna thu motsei amahon chihna atiu a lam loutah a kinelna a kon chun kihei mangin;
mi kimkhat hiche chihna chu ahoithopiuvin ginchatna lama abidoiyu akhel tauve. Lungsetna chu nachunga um hen.
